overview: Sri Krishna College of Engineering and Technology (SKCET), located in Kuniamuthur, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, is a premier autonomous engineering institution established in 1985. Affiliated with Anna University, the college is highly regarded for its sprawling green campus, state-of-the-art infrastructure, industry-driven engineering curriculum, and exceptional placement ecosystem. SKCET is widely recognized for its multi-disciplinary technical education and extensive digital learning practices.
accreditation: Accredited with NAAC Grade 'A'; Flagship undergraduate B.E./B.Tech programs are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA).

placements.placementRate: Overall placement rate reaches up to 90.09% – 97% across disciplines
placements.totalOffers: 1,503+ job offers extended during the 2025 recruitment drive
placements.companiesVisited: Over 221 to 234 companies participated in recruitment events
placements.internshipHighlights: High-stipend internship offers from major tech corporations like Amazon featuring ₹40,000 monthly stipends

admissions.admissionProcess: Engineering admissions strictly adhere to TNEA single-window counseling based on 12th board merit scores. Postgraduate admissions for MBA/MCA are processed via TANCET scores.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines run parallel with the official Anna University, TNEA counseling schedules, and TANCET entrance result portals.

facilities: Aero Vision Drone Center of Excellence
campus.specialNote: Separate monthly multi-cuisine mess charges are collected over basic room allocation fees.

contact.address: Sri Krishna College of Engineering and Technology, Kuniamuthur, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu – 641008, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: SKCET Merit Scholarships provide specific tuition fee waivers for top academic achievers.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% tuition coverage options under select Tamil Nadu Government first-graduate and rural quota structures.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Tuition reductions are granted to EWS candidates and Single Girl Child applicants.
scholarships.governmentAid: Full post-matric and communal scholarship disbursements are accessible for SC/ST/OBC/MBC students via Tamil Nadu state web portals.
